hero.title: Turn travel content into recurring revenue
hero.description: Join 10+ business of travel agencies, creators, and tourism brands earning commission by helping travelers stay connected in 100+ countries — with real-time tracking and payouts you can count on.

why.label: Partner Benefits
why.title: Built for people who help others travel smarter
why.description: Everything you need to add a new travel experience to your business — without adding costs and only your digits.

commission.title: Commission Earnings
commission.description: Earn up to 60% on commissions from travel purchases through your ticket and credit card. This is a great way to earn income from travel.

discounts.title: Exclusive Discount Codes
discounts.description: Every user will receive a discount code for their ticket. This code is valid for a limited time only.

marketing.title: Marketing Support
marketing.description: Get marketing support from our expert team to help you reach your goals.

analytics.title: Real-Time Analysis
analytics.description: Track ticket conversions and analyze the performance of your ticket. This data is essential for making informed decisions.

global.title: Global Reach
global.description: Offers access to 100 countries and 50+ travel partners. This global reach is essential for your business.

scalable.title: Scalable Growth
scalable.description: From a single ticket to full-fledged network, our trusted network partners will help you grow your business.

steps.title: From application to your first payout
steps.subtitle: Four simple steps. Most partners are live and promoting within a week.

apply.title: Apply
apply.description: Tell us about your audience and platform. The application takes less than five minutes to complete.

approve.title: Approve
approve.description: Our partnerships team reviews your application and sets up your dashboard within 48 hours.

promote.title: Promote
promote.description: Share your unique link or discount code across your site, social channels, or itineraries.

earn.title: Commission
earn.description: Earn commission on every eSIM plan purchased through your link, paid out monthly to your account.

benefits.label: Partner Benefits
benefits.title: Everything you need to grow with confidence
benefits.description: We've built our partner program the way we'd want it as partners ourselves — transparent, well-supported, and built to scale alongside you.

manager.title: Dedicated Partner Manager
manager.description: Every account gets a dedicated partner manager to help you optimize and grow.

payouts.title: Monthly Payouts
payouts.description: Get paid reliably every month via bank transfer or PayPal with no minimum threshold.

assets.title: Co-Branded Assets
assets.description: Access co-branded landing pages and creative assets to boost your conversions.

api.title: API Access
api.description: Integrate our platform directly into your travel agency or app with full API access.

support.title: Priority Support
support.description: Your travelers get priority customer support for a seamless experience.

early.title: Early Access
early.description: Be the first to access new destinations and plans before they launch publicly.

application.label: Start Earning
application.title: Ready to start earning?
application.description: Fill out the form and our partnerships team will get back to you within 48 hours. We can't wait to see what we'll build together.

commitment.title: No commitment required
commitment.description: Applying is free and carries no obligation.

review.title: Human review, every time
review.description: A real person from our team reviews each application.

trust.label: 1,200+ partners already earning with Net Sim

audience.label: Tell us about your audience
audience.placeholder: Share a bit about your audience size, platforms, and how you'd like to promote Net Sim...

success.description: Thank you for applying! Our partnerships team will review your application and get back to you within 48 hours.

setupGuide.label: — SETUP GUIDE —
setupGuide.title: How to Install eSIM
setupGuide.subtitle: Get your eSIM up and running in minutes with our simple setup process. Follow the instructions below to activate your plan and enjoy instant connectivity anytime, anywhere.

ios.title: Open Settings
ios.description: Go to your iPhone's Settings app and tap on the Settings icon.

ios.title: Select Cellular
ios.description: Scroll down and tap on 'Cellular' or 'Mobile Data' in the Settings menu.

ios.title: Add Cellular Plan
ios.description: Tap on 'Add Cellular Plan' or 'Add Data Plan' option.

ios.title: Scan QR Code
ios.description: Use your camera to scan the QR code provided in your eSIM activation email.

ios.title: Confirm Installation
ios.description: Review the plan details and tap 'Add Cellular Plan' to confirm.

ios.title: Enable Data Roaming
ios.description: Go back to Cellular settings and make sure Data Roaming is turned ON for your new eSIM.

android.title: Open Settings
android.description: Go to your Android device's Settings app and look for Network & Internet or Connections.

android.title: Select SIM & Network
android.description: Tap on 'SIM cards' or 'SIM card manager' in the Network settings.

android.title: Add eSIM
android.description: Select 'Add eSIM' or 'Download eSIM' option from the SIM manager.

android.title: Scan QR Code
android.description: Use your camera to scan the QR code from your eSIM activation email or enter the activation code manually.

android.title: Download Profile
android.description: Wait for the eSIM profile to download and install on your device.

android.title: Set as Default
android.description: Choose your new eSIM as the default for calls, texts, and data, or set it as secondary.

ios: Make sure your device is connected to Wi-Fi during installation
iOS 12.1 or later is required for eSIM support
Keep your physical SIM card as backup until eSIM is activated
Contact support if you encounter any issues during installation
android: Android 9.0 or later is required for eSIM support
Not all Android devices support eSIM - check device compatibility first
Keep your physical SIM card for backup during installation
Enable Data Roaming in Network settings after installation
Contact your device manufacturer if eSIM option is not available
